data.content: Reviewed commit 4221f588dd03: doctor now warns when legacy backend.type=cli is persisted, offers migrate->auto, wires the check into runDoctor/streamDoctor, and covers detection plus fix behavior in unit tests. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test passed (1891 tests). bun run build fails when inherited NODE_ENV=development, but succeeds with NODE_ENV=production, so the feature itself is approved with that environment caveat noted.
